question: Whenever your vehicle is placarded, do not drive near open fires unless you:
canonical_answer:
a. Can safely pass the fire without stopping
b. Have LTL of a nonflammable material
c. Are equipped with fire sprinklers.
d. Unless you can stay 100-200 feet away from the fire

A

appears_in.title: Cdl Hazmat Practice Test
appears_in.answer: can safely pass the fire without stopping

appears_in.answer: can safely pass the fire without stopping
